title: GitHub Copilot is moving to usage-based billing
content: GitHub Copilot will shift to usage‑based billing on June 1 2026. All plans will receive a monthly allotment of GitHub AI Credits, calculated by token consumption, and can buy more if needed. Base prices remain unchanged: Pro $10/month, Pro+ $39/month, Business $19/user/month, Enterprise $39/user/month. Code completions stay free of credits; other features use credits. A preview billing tool will launch in May to help users anticipate costs.
eventKey: github-copilot-moving-usage-based-billing
normalizedTitle: github copilot is moving to usage-based billing

title: Fully Featured Audio DSP Firmware for the Raspberry Pi Pico
content: A firmware package delivers comprehensive digital signal processing capabilities for the Raspberry Pi Pico, enabling advanced audio applications directly on the microcontroller. The release includes a range of DSP features, such as filtering, effects, and mixing, packaged for easy integration. It supports typical audio use cases on the Pico, simplifying development for hobbyists and makers. The project draws attention on Hacker News, highlighting its utility and suitability for embedded audio projects.

title: 美国通过对炼油厂实施制裁，将中国卷入战争对峙
content: The United States has imposed sanctions on Chinese refinery operations, extending a broader policy of punitive measures against China's energy sector. The action is intended to pressure China amid escalating tensions with the United States over political and economic disputes. By targeting key refineries, the sanctions aim to disrupt supply chains and influence China's position in the ongoing geopolitical standoff. This move underscores the U.S. strategy of leveraging industrial control to counter Chinese influence and secure compliance with its foreign‑policy objectives.

content: FanDuel is expanding into prediction markets, aiming to compete with existing platforms in this growing sector. By offering markets on various events—sports, politics, and other areas—the company seeks to attract users who enjoy forecasting outcomes and earning through accurate predictions. This strategic move positions FanDuel as a challenger in a space dominated by established prediction market providers, hoping to capture market share and diversify its product lineup.

title: 全球本地部署开发者们一起，打造一个真正属于开源社区的 Coding Agent 了
content: A community-driven project aims to build a truly open-source Coding Agent that runs locally on 8 B models, bypassing costly API services. It tackles issues like limited context, unreliable network, and ineffective tool use by employing a lightweight LLM gate and deterministic expert modules (MOE). Key features include BM25 + AST-based file locating, prompt‑sized patching, automated verification with local or Bing/duckduckgo search, and a self‑learning expert system that adapts to repeated tasks. The open-source code invites contributions, enabling developers to share custom experts and improve the agent without large‑model APIs.

normalizedTitle: 全球本地部署开发者们一起 打造一个真正属于开源社区的 coding agent 了

title: Ben Horowitz on Venture Capital and AI
content: Ben Horowitz and AMP founder Anjney Midha discuss how venture capital has evolved from a small, relationship‑driven industry into a scalable system for backing technology firms. They cover network effects, firm design, leadership, culture, and the impact of AI on capital competition and the types of companies that can now be built.

title: 分布式架构下配额设计：JuiceFS 的实现与典型案例
content: 在分布式存储环境中，存储资源通常由多个用户、项目和业务共享使用。如果缺乏有效的约束机制，单一主体的异常写入或误操作，可能迅速消耗大量空间或 inode，进而影响系统稳定性与成本控制。配额管理正是为共享环境建立可预测资源边界的重要手段。

title: qwen3.6 27b 本地编码测试
content: The user tested a local 27B Qwen model on an A100 40 GB GPU, noting slow output (≈40 t/s). Prompt design mimicked Rolex style, requiring Roman numerals, a moon-phase calendar, and an elegant aesthetic. Many iterations focused on the moon-phase component. They concluded that even small‑parameter models maintain good intelligence and that connecting a local model to Trae IDE for coding is fully functional.
eventKey: qwen3-27b-本地编码测试
normalizedTitle: qwen3 6 27b 本地编码测试

title: DeepSeek V4有望为AI带来系统性革新！港股通信息技术指数近1月累计涨幅超20%
content: The Hong Kong “Information Technology” ETF (159131) has surged over 20% in the first month of 2026, outperforming the Hang Seng Tech and HKIT indices. It focuses on hard‑tech stocks, excluding big‑cap internet firms, and holds major holdings like SMIC, Huawei and Lenovo. Meanwhile, Open Source Securities highlighted that DeepSeek V4, released April 24, could force AI vendors to shift to lower‑cost, open models, boosting domestic chip demand and accelerating AI infrastructure expansion.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 港股科技姐
